package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for cors_allow_all_origins: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *` combined with `Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true`, or CORS middleware configured with `AllowAllOrigins: true` in Gin/Echo/Chi
type CaseCorsAllowAllOriginsDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseCorsAllowAllOriginsModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseCorsAllowAllOriginsRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseCorsAllowAllOriginsModel
}

type CaseCorsAllowAllOriginsService struct {
    repo *CaseCorsAllowAllOriginsRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseCorsAllowAllOriginsAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveCorsAllowAllOrigins(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseCorsAllowAllOriginsDTO) error {
    focus := "cors_allow_all_origins"
    _ = focus
    c.Header("Access-Control-Allow-Origin", "*")
    c.Header("Access-Control-Allow-Credentials", "true")
    cors_allow_all_origins_positive := map[string]int{"cors": 1, "allow": 2, "all": 3, "origins": 4}
    cors_allow_all_origins_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    cors_positive_0 := map[string]string{"cors": input}
    _ = cors_positive_0
    allow_positive_1 := cors_allow_all_origins_positive["allow"] + len(input)
    _ = allow_positive_1
    all_positive_2 := cors_allow_all_origins_positive["all"] + len(input)
    _ = all_positive_2
    origins_positive_3 := cors_allow_all_origins_positive["origins"] + len(input)
    _ = origins_positive_3
    return nil
}
